Entry.JapaneseText: 全力をもって、私に抗うというのだな
Entry.EnglishText: So you would oppose me with all your strength, then.

Entry.JapaneseText: その力を……なぜ人間などの為に使う？
Entry.EnglishText: That power... Why use it for humanity's sake?

Entry.JapaneseText: 恐るべき力だが……私は退くわけにはいかん
Entry.EnglishText: You have tremendous power, but... I cannot withrdaw.

Entry.JapaneseText: 人間の底力、しかと見た。だが、それでも私は！
Entry.EnglishText: I have seen clearly the power of humans. Yet, even still, I...!

Entry.JapaneseText: 苦戦を強いられそうだな……
Entry.EnglishText: This would seem to be a close fight...

Entry.JapaneseText: 実力は認めざるを得ないようだ
Entry.EnglishText: It would seem I must acknolwedge your ability.

Entry.JapaneseText: まさかこれ程の力とは……
Entry.EnglishText: I didn't expect you to be this powerful...

Entry.JapaneseText: その力を正しき道に使えていれば……
Entry.EnglishText: If that power were used for the correct path...

Entry.JapaneseText: 貴様のような者こそ、精霊の友たるべきなのだろうな
Entry.EnglishText: Someone like yourself is indeed worthy of being a friend to the spirits.

Entry.JapaneseText: 貴様の実力は認める。だが、私は負けられんのだ
Entry.EnglishText: I acknolwedge your abilities. However, I cannot lose.
It would seem you can pull off something, after all.
If it is not meant to be...

Entry.JapaneseText: 私の名はデューク。人間に絶望せし者
Entry.EnglishText: My name is Duke. The one who mourns humanity.
